subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter numbered 24 hath been received. Henceforth, do thou be attentive to the numbers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه نمروی ۲۴ رسید من بعد نمروها را دقت نمااید این دفعه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @law of Huququ'llah, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Shrines and Holy places, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
